title: Japanese-Style Chicken Manti
description: A Japanese twist on the traditional Turkish dish, manti. Chicken drumsticks are wrapped in a delicate dough and steamed to perfection.

ingredients.name: manti dough
ingredients.notes: available at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: Prepare manti dough according to package instructions.
Wrap each chicken drumstick with a piece of dough, making sure to seal the edges.
Steam the manti for 8-10 minutes, or until the dough is cooked and the chicken is heated through.
Heat sesame oil in a small pan over medium heat.
Add grated ginger and soy sauce to the pan and stir to combine.
Brush the sauce over the steamed manti.
Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.
